# Configure OpenTofu Module

This gruntbook uses `source="::cli_gruntbook_source"` to dynamically load whatever OpenTofu module URL was passed to the `gruntbooks open` command.

## Configure Module Variables

<TfModule id="module-vars" source="::cli_gruntbook_source" />

## Preview Generated Configuration

<TemplateInline id="terragrunt-config" inputsId="module-vars" outputPath="terragrunt.hcl" generateFile={true}>
```hcl
terraform {
  source = "{{ .inputs._module.source }}"
}

include "root" {
  path   = find_in_parent_folders("root.hcl")
  expose = true
}

inputs = {
{{- range $name, $hcl := .inputs._module.hcl_inputs }}
  {{ $name }} = {{ $hcl }}
{{- end }}
}
```
</TemplateInline>
